title: No Title
summary: Elevance Health Foundation is a catalyst for positive change that supports community-based nonprofit organizations improving lives and communities.
llm_eligibility: Community-based nonprofit organizations across the U.S.
National programs prioritizing scalable and sustainable systemic change.
Local programs implementing relevant interventions in California, Florida, Georgia, Indiana, Missouri, Nevada, New York, Ohio, Texas, and Virginia.
eligibility_signals: nonprofit; 501(c)(3); organization; eligible; must be; requirements
